mapper.select: SELECT alarm_tracking_id AS alarmTrackingId, alarm_rule_id AS alarmRuleId, instance_id AS instanceId, database_id AS databaseId, first_triggered_at AS firstTriggeredAt, last_checked_at AS lastCheckedAt, consecutive_count AS consecutiveCount, current_value AS currentValue, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM alarm_tracking WHERE alarm_tracking_id = #{alarmTrackingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_tracking ( alarm_rule_id, instance_id, database_id, first_triggered_at, last_checked_at, consecutive_count, current_value, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{alarmRuleId}, #{instanceId}, #{databaseId}, #{firstTriggeredAt}, #{lastCheckedAt}, #{consecutiveCount}, #{currentValue}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm_tracking SET last_checked_at = #{lastCheckedAt}, consecutive_count = #{consecutiveCount}, current_value = #{currentValue}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE alarm_tracking_id = #{alarmTrackingId}
UPDATE alarm_tracking SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE alarm_tracking_id = #{alarmTrackingId}
